title.en: Tunnelling management frames in-band: the On-channel Tunnel (OCTunnel) primitives
title.zh: 带内隧道封装管理帧：同信道隧道（OCTunnel）原语

blocks.en: Imagine an MLME that has a perfectly good management frame to send — but it sits on a band or radio that isn't currently the one doing the transmitting. It can't just step away to the other channel to deliver it. So instead it does something elegant: it hands the whole, fully-formed management MMPDU to a sibling MLME that *is* able to transmit, and asks that sibling to carry it across as cargo. The frame travels in-band, on the operating channel, wrapped inside another frame — an envelope carrying another envelope. That mechanism is On-channel Tunneling (OCT), and the MLME-OCTunnel primitive family is its control surface.
blocks.zh: 设想有一个 MLME 手里握着一份完整、可用的管理帧要发出去——可它所在的频段或射频此刻并不是负责发送的那一个。它没法直接切到另一个信道去投递。于是它做了一件优雅的事：把这份完整成形的管理 MMPDU 整体交给一个*确实*能发送的兄弟 MLME，请这个兄弟把它当作“货物”捎带过去。这份帧就在带内、在工作信道上传输，被包裹在另一份帧里面——一个信封里装着另一个信封。这套机制就是同信道隧道（OCT），而 MLME-OCTunnel 原语家族正是它的控制面。

blocks.en: Why "on-channel"? OCT is part of multi-band operation (clause 11.31). A multi-band device has more than one MLME — one per band/radio. The trick is that management content destined for a peer doesn't have to be transmitted by the MLME that authored it; a co-located, currently-enabled MLME tunnels it out on the channel it's already on. No channel switch, no leaving the air you're on.
blocks.zh: 为什么叫“同信道”？OCT 属于多频段操作（第 11.31 节）的一部分。一个多频段设备拥有多个 MLME——每个频段／射频一个。其中的巧思在于：要发给对端的管理内容，并不一定要由“撰写”它的那个 MLME 来发送；一个同处一台设备、当前正处于可发送状态的 MLME，可以在它本就所处的信道上把这份内容隧道送出去。无需切换信道，也不必离开当前所在的空口。

blocks.en: The family is a clean request/indication/confirm triad — the classic shape of an MLME-SAP service. MLME-OCTunnel.request asks the local MAC to build and transmit an On-channel Tunnel Request frame toward a PeerSTAAddress; it carries the opaque inner OCT MMPDU plus two pieces of routing context — a Multi-band peer element (which peer MLME should receive the cargo) and an OCT source element (which MLME authored it). MLME-OCTunnel.indication fires at the receiver when such a frame arrives, unwrapping the inner MMPDU and delivering it upward — plus a Tunneled RXVECTOR so the receiver knows the PHY conditions it arrived under. MLME-OCTunnel.confirm closes the loop back at the sender, reporting a simple ResultCode (SUCCESS or FAILURE) for the transmit attempt.
blocks.zh: 这个家族是一个干净的请求／指示／确认三元组——也正是 MLME-SAP 服务的经典形态。MLME-OCTunnel.request 请求本地 MAC 构造并向某个 PeerSTAAddress 发送一份“同信道隧道请求帧”；它携带不透明的内层 OCT MMPDU，外加两条路由上下文——一个 Multi-band peer（多频段对端）元素（指明应由哪个对端 MLME 接收这份货物），以及一个 OCT source（OCT 源）元素（指明是哪个 MLME 撰写了它）。当这样一份帧到达时，接收侧触发 MLME-OCTunnel.indication，把内层 MMPDU 拆封并上交——同时附上一个 Tunneled RXVECTOR，让接收方知道它是在怎样的 PHY 条件下到达的。MLME-OCTunnel.confirm 则在发送侧合上回路，为这次发送尝试报告一个简单的 ResultCode（SUCCESS 或 FAILURE）。

blocks.en: There's a useful mental shortcut the standard itself offers: although the primitives look like one MLME talking directly to another, that direct MLME-to-MLME exchange is really shorthand. Under the hood it routes through the SMEs and the multi-band entity — an MLME addresses a peer MLME by sending the primitive up through its own SME and the multi-band entity, which reflects it onward to the SME of the MLME that is actually enabled to transmit. The on-air result is the On-channel Tunnel Request Action frame, exchanged in-band on the operating channel, so cooperating MLMEs in a multi-band setup can move management content around without anyone leaving their channel.
blocks.zh: 标准本身给出了一个很有用的心智捷径：尽管这些原语看起来像是一个 MLME 在直接对另一个 MLME 说话，但这种“MLME 到 MLME 的直接交互”其实只是一种简写。在底层，它会经由各自的 SME 和多频段实体进行路由——一个 MLME 要寻址对端 MLME，是把原语向上经过自己的 SME 和多频段实体送出，再由后者转交给那个真正可发送的 MLME 的 SME。其空口表现就是“同信道隧道请求”动作帧（Action frame），在工作信道上带内交换。如此一来，多频段配置中相互协作的 MLME 便能搬运管理内容，而无需任何一方离开自己所在的信道。

caption.en: OCT in action: an MLME that can't transmit hands its MMPDU to a transmit-enabled sibling, which carries it in-band to the peer device, where it is unwrapped and delivered upward.
caption.zh: OCT 工作示意：无法发送的 MLME 把它的 MMPDU 交给可发送的兄弟 MLME，由后者在带内捎带到对端设备，再在那里拆封并上交。

summary.en: Parameter-level detail: what each primitive actually carries
summary.zh: 参数级细节：每个原语究竟携带了什么

blocks.en: Clause 6.5.21 lays out the triad precisely. MLME-OCTunnel.request (6.5.21.2) takes PeerSTAAddress (any valid individual MAC address), OCT MMPDU (an OCT MMPDU Descriptor field per the On-channel Tunnel Request frame format, 9.6.20.7), Multi-band peer (a Multi-band element, 9.4.2.137, naming the peer MLME that should receive the cargo), and OCT source (an OCT Source element, 9.4.2.244, naming the originating MLME); on receipt the MLME constructs and attempts to transmit the frame. MLME-OCTunnel.indication (6.5.21.3) is generated at the receiver and carries PeerSTAAddress (the sender), OCT MMPDU, Multi-band local (the local MLME that should receive it), OCT source, and a Tunneled RXVECTOR (a copy of the PHY's RXVECTOR for the received frame); on receipt the MLME retrieves the tunneled frame and processes it as though received over the WM. MLME-OCTunnel.confirm (6.5.21.4) carries just a ResultCode enumeration (SUCCESS or FAILURE) and is generated as the result of a prior .request. The standard's Figure 6-15 shows the NT-MLME / TR-MLME split inside each multi-band device and notes that the apparent direct MLME-to-MLME exchange is shorthand for routing through the SMEs and multi-band entity.
blocks.zh: 第 6.5.21 节精确地铺陈了这个三元组。MLME-OCTunnel.request（6.5.21.2）接收 PeerSTAAddress（任意有效的单播 MAC 地址）、OCT MMPDU（按同信道隧道请求帧格式 9.6.20.7 定义的 OCT MMPDU 描述符字段）、Multi-band peer（一个 Multi-band 元素，9.4.2.137，指明应接收货物的对端 MLME）以及 OCT source（一个 OCT Source 元素，9.4.2.244，指明撰写它的源 MLME）；收到后，MLME 即构造并尝试发送该帧。MLME-OCTunnel.indication（6.5.21.3）在接收侧生成，携带 PeerSTAAddress（发送方）、OCT MMPDU、Multi-band local（应接收它的本地 MLME）、OCT source，以及一个 Tunneled RXVECTOR（接收该帧时 PHY 的 RXVECTOR 副本）；收到后，MLME 取出被隧道封装的帧，当作经无线媒介（WM）收到一样处理。MLME-OCTunnel.confirm（6.5.21.4）仅携带一个 ResultCode 枚举（SUCCESS 或 FAILURE），并作为先前 .request 的结果而生成。标准的图 6-15 展示了每个多频段设备内部 NT-MLME／TR-MLME 的划分，并指出那看似直接的 MLME 到 MLME 交互，实为经由各 SME 与多频段实体路由的简写。

cites.note: 6.5.21.1 General — OCT used in multi-band operation; OCT frames transport Management frames between peer MLMEs; Figure 6-15 operation of OCT; SME/multi-band-entity shorthand
6.5.21.2 MLME-OCTunnel.request (PeerSTAAddress, OCT MMPDU, Multi-band peer, OCT source) and 6.5.21.3 MLME-OCTunnel.indication (adds Multi-band local, Tunneled RXVECTOR)
